changes.field: Front matter — all 5 required SOP v1.3.1 fields valid
changes.finding: All five mandatory front matter fields present and correctly valued. work_id, branch, risk_level, execution_model, and change_type all present. MIXED/STANDARD is correct: this sprint modifies frontend display semantics (BEHAVIOUR surface) and string/label content (CONTENT surface) with no scoring, signal evaluation, root-cause, or Knowledge Bus assets touched. TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH is appropriate.

changes.field: MIXED/STANDARD risk classification correct — escalation boundary verified
changes.finding: Sprint modifies label strings (CONTENT) and conditional rendering logic (BEHAVIOUR) in frontend only. No Intelligence Core components touched. The escalation STOP conditions at prompt lines 19-29 correctly guard against scope creep into scoring, signal evaluation, root-cause, KB assets, IDL records, domain confidence rules, marker-to-subsystem grouping, or analytical pipeline behaviour. STANDARD holds unless an escalation trigger fires during implementation.
citations: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md lines 12-29: Classification and escalation STOP conditions

changes.field: All 4 controlling authority files present including STOP-condition file (Stage 2A)
changes.finding: All four authority files in the prompt 'Read before doing anything' block confirmed on disk. The STOP condition 'If the DOMAIN-UX1A notes file is missing, STOP' (prompt line 62) is satisfiable — file is present.

changes.field: Defect 1 — Score reliability label absent: CONFIRMED in source (Stage 2A cross-ref)
changes.finding: Wave1DomainCards.tsx renders wave1ScoreReliabilityLabel(d.confidence_tier) with no label prefix. The rendered output is a bare value: 'Limited reliability'. No 'Score reliability:' label text exists anywhere in the component. Defect is genuine — sprint is not a no-op for this item.
citations: frontend/app/lib/wave1HealthSystemCardDisplay.ts lines 6-10: wave1ScoreReliabilityLabel() returns bare string 'Good reliability' / 'Moderate reliability' / 'Limited reliability' — no prefix

changes.field: Defect 2 — Evidence completeness label absent: CONFIRMED in source (Stage 2A cross-ref)
changes.finding: wave1EvidenceCompletenessLine() returns 'Based on X of Y expected markers on your panel' — no 'Evidence completeness:' label prefix. The component renders this string value-only at lines 105-107. Sprint must add the label either by updating the function return value or adding a label element in JSX.
citations: frontend/app/lib/wave1HealthSystemCardDisplay.ts lines 22-27: wave1EvidenceCompletenessLine() returns 'Based on {numerator} of {denominator} expected markers on your panel' — no label prefix

changes.field: Defect 3 — Zero-evidence cards show 0/100 and Needs attention: CONFIRMED in source (Stage 2A cross-ref)
changes.finding: No conditional branch exists for the case evidence_completeness_numerator === 0 AND evidence_completeness_denominator > 0. scorePct is computed unconditionally as Math.round(Math.max(0, Math.min(1, d.score)) * 100) and rendered. band_label is displayed unconditionally via wave1BandLabelDisplay(). When backend emits score=0 and band_label='review' with zero evidence, card shows '0 / 100' and 'Needs attention'. No insufficient-data state exists.
citations: frontend/app/components/results/Wave1DomainCards.tsx line 69: scorePct = Math.round(Math.max(0, Math.min(1, d.score)) * 100) — unconditional
frontend/app/components/results/Wave1DomainCards.tsx lines 92-101: score and band_label rendered unconditionally, no zero-evidence guard
frontend/app/components/results/Wave1DomainCards.tsx lines 72-73: num and den read from DTO — data is available for a zero-evidence conditional

changes.field: DTO fields evidence_completeness_numerator and evidence_completeness_denominator already present — no backend changes required (Stage 2A cross-ref)
changes.finding: DOMAIN-UX1A already added both fields to the TypeScript interface and the Pydantic model. The component already reads them at lines 72-73. The data pipeline is complete. This sprint requires NO new DTO fields. All defects are fixable with frontend-only changes to Wave1DomainCards.tsx and wave1HealthSystemCardDisplay.ts only. Backend files results.py and domain_score_assembler.py need not be touched.
citations: frontend/app/types/analysis.ts lines 353-354: evidence_completeness_numerator?: number; evidence_completeness_denominator?: number; — ALREADY PRESENT
frontend/app/components/results/Wave1DomainCards.tsx lines 72-73: const num = d.evidence_completeness_numerator ?? 0; const den = d.evidence_completeness_denominator ?? 0; — ALREADY READS DTO

changes.field: All regression test files and Sentinel pack present (Stage 2A)
changes.finding: All test files named in Required Validation Commands confirmed on disk. Sentinel pack confirmed present.

changes.field: Forbidden file boundary verified — no overlap with required implementation paths (Stage 2B)
changes.finding: Required implementation touches only Wave1DomainCards.tsx and wave1HealthSystemCardDisplay.ts (plus test files and Sentinel pack). These are fully disjoint from the forbidden list. Backend DTO files (results.py, domain_score_assembler.py) are NOT required for this sprint — the DTO fields already exist.

changes.field: STOP conditions complete, actionable, and non-blocking to a correct implementation (Stage 2B)
changes.finding: Token missing/mismatched → STOP. Authority notes file missing → STOP. Baseline issues not found in code → STOP with no-op risk. Implementation requires any of nine listed escalation triggers → escalate HIGH + STOP. All STOP conditions are well-defined and unambiguous.
citations: automation_bus/latest_cursor_prompt.md line 62: DOMAIN-UX1A notes file STOP

changes.finding: All preflight, validation, and closure commands use Python, npm, git, and Test-Path — no bash-only syntax.

changes.field: wave1EvidenceCompletenessLine() string format change will break existing test assertions
changes.finding: The existing Wave1DomainCards.test.tsx assertions almost certainly assert on the current value-only output of wave1EvidenceCompletenessLine() ('Based on X of Y expected markers on your panel'). Sprint must update these test assertions when changing the function output or adding a label element. If Cursor adds the label in JSX rather than in the function, test queries by text content will also need updating. Required tests section explicitly calls for label + value testing — but existing passing tests must be updated rather than deleted.
changes.resolution: Non-blocking. Cursor must update Wave1DomainCards.test.tsx assertions in sync with any change to label rendering. Required tests must verify label + value together, not just value.

changes.field: Zero-evidence conditional must use num === 0 AND den > 0, not score === 0
changes.finding: The prompt correctly specifies the gate as evidence_completeness_numerator === 0 AND evidence_completeness_denominator > 0 (prompt lines 153-156). Cursor must not substitute score === 0 as the gate condition, since a score of zero is a legitimate backend output even with partial evidence. The DTO fields num and den are already read at lines 72-73 and are available for the conditional. When den === 0, the current wave1EvidenceCompletenessLine fallback 'Evidence coverage not available' applies — this edge case must remain handled.
changes.resolution: Non-blocking. Cursor instruction: gate the zero-evidence display branch on num === 0 && den > 0. Leave the den <= 0 fallback in wave1EvidenceCompletenessLine() unchanged.

changes.field: Sentinel classes must each point to an active test — not a placeholder
changes.finding: The four required Sentinel defect classes (health_system_card_reliability_label_missing, health_system_card_evidence_completeness_label_missing, health_system_card_zero_evidence_shows_needs_attention, health_system_card_zero_evidence_shows_primary_zero_score) must each reference a real test function. The existing escaped_defects_v1.json structure uses a test_ref or equivalent pointer field. No Sentinel entry may be added without a corresponding active deterministic test in this sprint.
changes.resolution: Non-blocking. Cursor must add the required test cases first, then reference them in Sentinel entries. Review existing escaped_defects_v1.json schema before adding entries to match the established schema.
